subcodes.first_line: O eloquent composer of verses! These were in the utmost eloquence and lucidity, and have been noted. They were novel and graceful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظم بلیغ اشعار در نهایت فصاحت و بلاغت بود ملاحظه گردید بدیع بود و لطیف
subcodes.subjects: @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @praise and encouragement
